slides.heading: If not us, if not you, then who?
slides.subtext: Step forward right now for Sanatan, Sanskar and Society.

slides.heading: If Sanatan survives, culture survives.
slides.subtext: Pass on your rich heritage to future generations.

slides.heading: Now is the time for action, not just reflection.
slides.subtext: Your small service can become someone's greatest hope.

slides.heading: Change is waiting for you.
slides.subtext: Your single step can bring positive transformation in many lives.

slides.heading: History remembers contributors, not spectators.
slides.subtext: Build a strong society with service, security and awareness.

slides.heading: Dharmo Rakshati Rakshitah
slides.subtext: Protect Dharma • Preserve Culture • Serve Humanity

footer.aboutText: Sanatan Dharm Manav Kalyan Foundation is a registered Section 8 non-profit organization dedicated to humanitarian service, culture preservation, and social welfare campaigns.
